short: An agent design that plans all tool calls up front to cut repeated model calls and cost.
definition: ReWOO (Reasoning Without Observation) is an agent pattern that separates planning from acting: the model writes a full plan of tool calls in one shot, the tools run, and the results are combined at the end. By avoiding a model call after every step, it lowers cost and latency compared with step-by-step loops like ReAct.
